field_values.action_summary: The Witch of the North arrives to greet Dorothy. She explains that while one witch is dead, another (the Wicked Witch of the West) remains a threat.
field_values.camera_intent: Two-shots for Dorothy and witch_of_the_north relationship; Over-the-shoulder shots for West exposition; Medium wide for munchkins group dynamic
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: witch_of_the_north costume must be white with star patterns
munchkins must remain present in background depth
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the magical guide through a formal greeting and pivot the narrative from immediate arrival confusion to the broader political threat of the Wicked Witch of the West.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler, white dress/clothing)
- witch_of_the_north (white, star-patterned costume)
- munchkins (background presence)

## Required Environments
- The clearing near the house (lush, colorful flowers, fruit-bearing trees, sparkling brook)

## Continuity Constraints
- witch_of_the_north: white, star-patterned attire
- munchkins: must be visible in background during main coverage
- dorothy: weary traveler appearance

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival and initial greeting
- BT002: Reassurance regarding the dead witch
- BT003: Warning regarding the Wicked Witch of the West
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
